name: Simple Sweet 'n' Sour Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (10 oz pkg) frozen cooked shrimp
1 Jar (9 oz) sweet and sour sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart microwave-safe casserole, stir together pasta, shrimp, vegetables, and water.
2. Cover; microwave at high for 15-18 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until pasta is tender.
3. Stir in sauce and peanuts until well blended.
